title: helichrysum orothamnus
intro: Helichrysum orothamnus, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum orothamnus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Helichrysum orothamnus is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
